zh.lifeSummary: 當William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,於1245年出生在英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆時，他的父親Baron Roger Venables IV35歲，母親Alicea Pennington24歲。他於1253年與Lady Margaret de Dutton在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年4月在英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,于1245年出生在英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆时，他的父亲Baron Roger Venables IV35岁，母亲Alicea Pennington24岁。他于1253年与Lady Margaret de Dutton在英国爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年4月在英国英格兰爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Baron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the title of nobility, along the lines of Earl and Duke . The title arose in the Norman feudal system and seems to be of Germanic origin, derived from Old English beorn ‘young warrior’ or a related continental Germanic form. In part the given name, and in particular the variant Barron , may represent the surname derived from the title.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, was born in 1245, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, his father, Baron Roger Venables IV, was 35 and his mother, Alicea Pennington, was 24. He married Lady Margaret de Dutton in 1253, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in April 1292, in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, est né en 1245, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Roger Venables IV, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alicea Pennington, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Dutton en 1253, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1292, à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, 1245 in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Roger Venables IV 35 und seine Mutter Alicea Pennington 24. Er hat 1253 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Lady Margaret de Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im April 1292 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, è nato il nel 1245 nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Baron Roger Venables IV, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alicea Pennington, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret de Dutton nel 1253, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1292, nel Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,が1245年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメで生まれた時，父Baron Roger Venables IVは35歳，母Alicea Penningtonは24歳であった。1253年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでLady Margaret de Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年4月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,(이)가 1245년 영국 체실르 킨더턴 c 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Roger Venables IV(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicea Pennington(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1253년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Lady Margaret de Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 c 훌에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 c 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, nasceu em 1245, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Roger Venables IV, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alicea Pennington, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret de Dutton em 1253, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1292, em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, родился в 1245 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Roger Venables IV было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicea Pennington, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Dutton в 1253 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер апрель 1292 г. в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Margaret de Dutton en 1253, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
